currency_risk: No query bytes were billed during this validation. Dry-run estimates were used for planning.

results.purpose: 10-year candidate discovery using CPC/date/country metadata only
results.decision: approved after explicit review; run only with --max-bytes 32212254720

results.purpose: monthly publication monitoring using CPC/date/country metadata only
results.decision: approved after explicit review; run at most monthly with --max-bytes 32212254720

results.purpose: 10-year candidate discovery using direct title/abstract text search
results.decision: do not run as a first-pass or scheduled query; use after CPC-first narrowing only

results.purpose: monthly publication monitoring using direct title/abstract text search
results.decision: do not run as a monthly job

zero_cost_policy.basis: Keep total monthly BigQuery query processing under the free tier and set maximumBytesBilled on every run.
safe_operating_model: Use CPC-first queries for scheduled runs.
Use direct title/abstract text queries only for one-off reviewed exploration.
Export local JSON/JSONL for the website.
Never make the website query BigQuery live.
